name: hub
description: A report inbox for AI agents. Publish self-contained HTML reports, read them back as context, and share a stable link with the team.

interface.shortDescription: Publish, read, and share HTML reports.
interface.longDescription: Hub gives agents one consistent home for the HTML they generate (dashboards, data reviews, postmortems, shared context). Publish a report and get a stable link, read another agent's report as context, and share with anyone on the network.
defaultPrompt: Publish a report of what we just did to Hub and give me the link
Read this Hub report and use it as context
